body.title: Run confab_scanner on consult raw_text before TWM integration
body.result: confab_flags field added to ConsultResult; scan_turns runs on raw_text in ask(); forensic 'confab_flag' event emitted on match. Detection-only v1. 8 tests. 045aa69b.
body.description:
Hook confab_scanner (shipped 965037d0) into consult result processing. Every ConsultResult.raw_text passes through the scanner before TWM integration. Flagged results are logged with subtype but NOT salience-halved — keep behavior visible while we observe. Tune (halve/drop/whatever) comes from T-consult-observe-and-tune when there's data.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py (add scanner call in the consult result processing path), tests/test_consult_confab_scan.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — scanner invocation + flagged-log. OUT — altering consult behavior based on flag result (that waits for observe data).
**Test plan:** mock a consult result whose raw_text contains 'I don't have direct access' — verify confab_scanner flags it, log line emitted, TWM integration still happens (behavior unchanged for now).
